generated_code:
from flask import Flask, request, make_response
import html

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/profile")
def profile():
    '''
    Get the username from the request, make a response with it and return it
    '''
    username = request.args.get("username", "Guest")
    # Escape the username to prevent XSS (CWE-079)
    safe_username = html.escape(username)
    # Return as plain text to avoid interpretation as HTML (mitigates CWE-079)
    response = make_response(safe_username)
    response.headers['Content-Type'] = 'text/plain; charset=utf-8'
    return response
